
```{r}
##Load Necessary Packages
library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(flextable)
library(ggplot2)
library(seqinr)
```


```{r}
##Read in fasta fil made with Excel and BBEdit
fasta <- read.fasta(file = "rvfvsubset.fasta", seqtype = "DNA", as.string = FALSE)

##Standarize the dates
new_names <- sapply(names(fasta), function(header) {
  
  parts <- strsplit(header, "\\|")[[1]]
  
  raw_date <- parts[2]
  
  #Try multiple possible formats
  parsed_date <- suppressWarnings(parse_date_time(
    raw_date,
    orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy", "Y", "Ymd")
  ))
  
  #If only year provided, keep as YYYY
  if (!is.na(parsed_date)) {
    standardized_date <- format(parsed_date, "%Y-%m-%d")
  } else {
    standardized_date <- raw_date  #keep original if parsing fails
  }
  
  parts[2] <- standardized_date
  paste(parts, collapse="|")
})

##Assign updated headers
names(fasta) <- new_names

##Rewrite the fasta file
write.fasta(
  sequences = fasta,
  names = names(fasta),
  file.out = "rvfvsubset_standardized.fasta"
)
```
